input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.3.2
            TITLE: the ei of the vertical side of the front bulkhead support structure must be equivalent to or

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.3.2: The EI of the vertical side of the Front Bulkhead support structure must be equivalent to or
F.7.3.2 The EI of the vertical side of the Front Bulkhead support structure must be equivalent to or 
more than the EI of one steel tube that it replaces when calculated as per F.4.4

final_answer: F.7.3.2 The EI of the vertical side of the Front Bulkhead support structure must be equivalent to or more than the EI of one steel tube that it replaces when calculated as per F.4.4
